answer: The Receiving Party (StartupXYZ) agrees not to disclose any trade secrets, business plans, technical data, or financial information of the Disclosing Party (GlobalTech Inc) for a period of 5 years (nda_agreement.html, p.1).
evidence: CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION: Receiving Party agrees not to disclose any trade secrets, business plans, technical data, or financial information of Disclosing Party for 5 years.
